chunks.summary: A monologue about fear and control is interrupted by a menacing threat from Raul Menendez.
The dialogue continues with discussion about Menendez's threat, with Speaker 3 condemning him as a terrorist, while Menendez (Speaker 2) urges David to focus on the future.
The dialogue continues with Menendez (Speaker 2) expressing fatalism about the world's state, while Speaker 1 insists on resistance. Speaker 3 interrupts to demand a status report.
Speaker 1 and Speaker 2 exchange a brief, tense dialogue about reality, followed by intense music and chanting.
Speaker 1 shouts at someone to pull themselves together amidst the ongoing chaos.
Raul Menendez taunts David about the difficulty of killing an idea, while another voice tells him he wasn't cut out to be a Mason. Speaker 1 declares an end to the games.
An announcer promotes the Reznov challenge pack for pre-orders.
No speech detected in this 0.04s chunk.

mechanicalTranscript:
--- CHUNK 0 [0.00s - 20.00s] ---
[0.00-2.50] Speaker 1: They want you afraid.
[3.20-5.50] Speaker 1: Fear makes you easier to control.
[9.00-10.50] Speaker 1: It's time to wake up.
[13.00-17.00] Speaker 2: Your streets shall once again run red with your blood.
[17.50-20.00] Speaker 2: Raul Menendez, United Global Unrest.

--- CHUNK 1 [20.00s - 40.00s] ---
[20.00-21.50] Speaker 1: on an unprecedented scale.
[22.10-23.50] Speaker 3: Menendez is a terrorist.
[23.90-26.20] Speaker 3: We're bringing peace and security to the world.
[26.80-28.90] Speaker 1: He refuses to let me go.
[29.50-32.50] Speaker 2: Stop looking backwards, David, but what matters is what we do next.
[36.20-38.50] Speaker 1: A lot of people counting on us for answers.

--- CHUNK 2 [40.00s - 60.00s] ---
[40.00-42.50] Speaker 2: The world is on the brink of collapse.
[43.00-46.00] Speaker 1: We cannot let him win, David. We have to stop him.
[46.50-50.00] Speaker 2: It's too late for that. The damage is already done.
[51.00-53.50] Speaker 3: Specter One, report.
[54.00-56.00] Speaker 1: We need a sitrep.

--- CHUNK 3 [60.00s - 80.00s] ---
[62.00-62.60] Speaker 1: This isn't real.
[63.10-64.10] Speaker 2: The hell it ain't.

--- CHUNK 4 [80.00s - 100.00s] ---
[98.00-99.50] Speaker 1: Pull it together, man!

--- CHUNK 5 [100.00s - 120.00s] ---
[100.00-102.10] Speaker 2: So eager to leave, David.
[102.10-106.50] Speaker 2: Killing a man is a hell of a lot easier than killing the idea.
[108.10-110.50] Speaker 3: You were never cut out to be a Mason.
[113.10-115.20] Speaker 1: No more games. This ends now.

--- CHUNK 6 [120.00s - 140.00s] ---
[120.00-124.50] Speaker 4: Get the Reznov challenge pack when you pre-order now.

--- CHUNK 7 [140.00s - 140.04s] ---
